basic_details.job_title: ACMS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Lower Division Clerk and Dissection Hall Attendant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS Delhi Cantt)
basic_details.post_name: Lower Division Clerk (LDC) and Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA)
basic_details.short_information: Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS Delhi Cantt) Lower Division Clerk (LDC) and Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 06 vacancies have been announced through the ACMS Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Below 50 years (55 years for ESM/JCOs) for LDC; Below 53 years for DHA (as on 01 Jul 2026)
age_limit.details: Lower Division Clerk (LDC): Below 50 years (55 years for ESM/JCOs) as on 01 July 2026. Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA): Below 53 years as on 01 July 2026. Age relaxation for ESM/JCOs for LDC post is applicable.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with three years experience, ESM with 10 years service as Clerk (for LDC), ESM (AMC, retired House Keeper) with minimum 15 years service (for DHA)
qualification.details: Lower Division Clerk (LDC): Graduate and computer literate with three years of experience in a reputed organization, preferably in an educational institution. For Ex-Servicemen (ESM), 10 years of service as Clerk in the Army is required. Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA): Ex-Servicemen (AMC, retired House Keeper) with a minimum of 15 years of service rendered in the Army Medical Corps.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,500/- per month for both Lower Division Clerk (LDC) and Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA) posts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ACMS Delhi Cantt Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ACMS Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ACMS Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026 is 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for LDC and DHA posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies, with 5 for Lower Division Clerk (LDC) and 1 for Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the LDC post?
faq.answer: For the LDC post, candidates must be a Graduate and computer literate with three years of relevant experience. Ex-Servicemen need 10 years of service as a Clerk.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the DHA post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA) post is below 53 years as on 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: Both Lower Division Clerk (LDC) and Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA) posts offer a salary of Rs. 25,500/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ACMS Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete application and required documents to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation for Ex-Servicemen (ESM) and Junior Commissioned Officers (JCOs) for the LDC post, allowing them to apply up to 55 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article.
